tool.name: MAIQMag Converter (NERSC)
tool.command:
#import re #set $experiment = re.sub('[\w]', '_', str($experiment)) #set $results_folder=str($project_dir)+"/maiqmag/simulations/" + str($experiment)+"/npy_files" mkdir spec params && #set $n_batches=0 #for $input_col in $mcvine_results #set $n_batches+=1 #end for #for $input_col in $mcvine_results mkdir -p inputs && tar -xf $input_col -C inputs/ && for input_file in inputs/*; do base=\$(basename "$input_file") temp=\${base%.h5} prefix=\${temp%_*} n=\${temp#*_} num=\$(( n + $n_batches * $input_col.element_identifier )) ln -s \$(realpath $input_file) spec/\${name}_\${num}.h5 done && rm -rf inputs && #end for
#for $input_col in $sunny_results mkdir -p inputs && tar -xf $input_col -C inputs/ && for input_file in inputs/*; do base=\$(basename "$input_file") temp=\${base%.h5} prefix=\${temp%_*} n=\${temp#*_} num=\$(( n + $n_batches * $input_col.element_identifier )) ln -s \$(realpath $input_file) params/\${name}_\${num}.h5 done && rm -rf inputs && #end for export PODMANHPC_ADDITIONAL_STORES="/dvs_ro/cfs/cdirs/m1503/maiqmag/images" && podman-hpc run --rm --group-add keep-groups -e HDF5_USE_FILE_LOCKING=FALSE -it -v $project_dir:$project_dir h5_to_npy pixi run --as-is app --params \$(pwd)/params --spec \$(pwd)/spec --output $results_folder > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2) && tar -cf $output_archive -C $results_folder .
tool.help:
**MAIQMag Converter**
This is a Galaxy tool to convert Sunny and MCVine results into Numpy training data arrays. It currently only runs on NERSC Perlmutter supercomputer.
